title: Special Programs: Other Special Populations
description: Conroe ISD provides additional support and resources for students who come from unique or underserved backgrounds, including those experiencing homelessness, those in foster care, and students of migratory families. The district outlines how these students are identified, enrolled, and connected to services that help them succeed academically despite challenges outside the classroom. Parents and community members can use this policy to understand what protections and supports the district is required to offer these vulnerable student groups.
